  "analysis": "The data structure is correct. The sample names are in row 1 starting at column 4, and the protein IDs are in column A starting at row 2. The MATCH function should be able to find these values.

from openpyxl import load_workbook

wb = load_workbook('protein_expression.xlsx')

# Test MATCH for sample name
ws_task.cell(35, 3).value = '=MATCH("NCIH1568_LUNG_TenPx15",Data.$1:$1,0)'
ws_task.cell(36, 3).value = '=MATCH("IPC298_SKIN_TenPx08",Data.$1:$1,0)'

# Test MATCH for protein ID
ws_task.cell(35, 5).value = '=MATCH("sp|Q9HCY8|S10AE_HUMAN",Data.$A:$A,0)'
ws_task.cell(36, 5).value = '=MATCH("sp|Q96EN8|MOCOS_HUMAN",Data.$A:$A,0)'

wb.save('protein_expression.xlsx')
print("Test formulas saved. Will check results after recalc.")

EOF
